show TABLE customer.stg_claims_t
RENAME COLUMN CLAIM_NUM TO claim_number;

EXEC sp_rename 'customer.stg_claims_t.TOKEN', 'input_token', 'COLUMN';

EXEC sp_rename 'customer.stg_claims_t.patient_zip_3', 'patient_zip3', 'COLUMN';
